details.IncidentDetail: "[2] A41-045 STOPPING TRAFFIC 97 JNO DORRIS HILL "

details.IncidentDetail:
"[10] -------------Original Message---------------- From: 115-Temecula (115) Sent: 3/17/2026 17:44:18 To: 115-Temecula; B115-039; B115-031 Subject: FW: RE:
-------------Original Message---------------- From: Felix D Lopez (A15237) Sent: 3/17/2026 17:27:52 To: 115-Temecula Subject: RE:
YES VIC IS A LOCATION OF TC // FOLLOWED SV TO PONTE WINERY BUT WENT BACK TO TC SCENE
-------------Original Message---------------- From: 115-Temecula (115) Sent: 3/17/2026 17:26:10 To: Felix D Lopez Subject:
LG II 578 IS THE VIC 1023 SOMEWHERE ?"
"[9] B115-031 DRIVER OF SV IS NOT HERE, VEHS ARE HRE, OCC RANCHO CAL / MONTE DE ORO I/S"
"[4] GRAPE ONR TO SB 5 2 VEHS ON RS REQ CHP "
"[1] GRY NISS RGE and WHI FORD FOCUS - BOTH ON RS "
